textByHashes.c4bd5b2f912fe1d0fd18b1abe72d74ed7412792e: Hello adventurer. My name is Brother Kojo. Do you happen to know the time?
textByHashes.3c6a7d6696419577b8e557d3a378bd2e9a5d3a5f: Exactly! This clock tower has recently broken down, and without it nobody can tell the correct time. I must fix it before the town people become too angry!
textByHashes.999ad7f5abf60f8d9176dbaa2ef6ca7da273db12: I don't suppose you could assist me in the repairs? I'll pay you for your help.
textByHashes.fac8146da9af6471e9ef269cf656ee4a620d17cf: Oh, thank you kind sir! In the cellar below, you'll find four cogs. They're too heavy for me, but you should be able to carry them one at a time.
textByHashes.212fd29a4ed375cb44822dcb52cff087efd4714b: Oh, thank you kind madam! In the cellar below, you'll find four cogs. They're too heavy for me, but you should be able to carry them one at a time.
textByHashes.007d3313615fae27f43dcfc615e9944acd8cfe0a: I know one goes on each floor... but I can't exactly remember which goes where specifically. Oh well, I'm sure you can figure it out fairly easily.
textByHashes.7950128107058a76d549bb7d571307100ebd32b8: Thank you again! And remember to be careful, the cellar is full of strange beasts!
textByHashes.8a5ada7ec9af7aeabd240eb104e6a68f271d9958: OK then. Come back and let me know if you change your mind.
textByHashes.bf166b4984cce4f0620a82477d1663fe3201a4a7: Oh hello, are you having trouble? The cogs are in four rooms below us. Place one cog on a pole on each of the four tower levels.
textByHashes.30830a1db99bc3daeb41896be01c92a4568bba4f: That's great. Come see me when you've done the other three.
textByHashes.c366786b86ee43cb2381525f0b8ecfb60f3d0219: Really..? Wait, listen! Well done, well done! Yes yes yes, you've done it! You ARE clever!
textByHashes.903d6def3c42c9f22f9d3bdfd797e046bb564105: The townsfolk will all be able to know the correct time now! Thank you so much for all of your help! And as promised, here is your reward!
textByHashes.673e7b97a42bf2c91e6029d779c078a710b18c6e: Oh hello there traveller. You've done a grand job with the clock. It's just like new.
textByHashes.c62e7f9e9e663a125d6342509c01928ff8d0a6a3: Hello, traveller, how can I help?
textByHashes.95ee64a920b225e5488e189bfd1bbca8d422c41e: I don't know if I can help you there.
textByHashes.1b026e15c89abec75612450657678e89656173a5: Ah, that I can help you with. I've been tinkering with this new idea of a watch and made a few. The problem is the villagers don't see the point as they have the Clock Tower!
textByHashes.5d7e80c8bf8143432a23be89a3f37c28690ca65d: You can have this one! It's the display model.
textByHashes.2d27127a382df9a274289420d5353865c38ccefa: I need you to answer this for me.
textByHashes.2ba3fa01f7b19ac0b94e945a7cc6928e5bc24315: Please enter the answer to the question.
textByHashes.d4b12bb58e5de9d4949e143ad973d433223a738d: How can that be? Go check again!
